item.title: Booking Date & Time

1 SEAT";}i:1;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2337";s:4:"text";s:19:"Abu Dhabi City Tour";}i:2;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2438";s:4:"text";s:23:"Afternoon Desert Safari";}i:3;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2411";s:4:"text";s:16:"Banana Boat Ride";}i:4;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2320";s:4:"text";s:30:"Canam Maverick 1700CC 2-Seater";}i:5;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2324";s:4:"text";s:30:"Canam Maverick 1700cc 4-Seater";}i:6;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2327";s:4:"text";s:34:"Custom Power Buggy 3000cc 2-Seater";}i:7;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2185";s:4:"text";s:22:"DESERT QUAD BIKE 250CC";}i:8;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2190";s:4:"text";s:22:"DESERT QUAD BIKE 450CC";}i:9;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2175";s:4:"text";s:22:"DESERT QUAD BIKE 150CC";}i:10;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"1970";s:4:"text";s:21:"DESERT QUAD BIKE 90CC";}i:11;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2435";s:4:"text";s:21:"Evening Desert Safari";}i:12;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2346";s:4:"text";s:15:"Dubai City Tour";}i:13;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2415";s:4:"text";s:17:"FLYBOARD IN DUBAI";}i:14;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2347";s:4:"text";s:19:"Hatta Mountain Tour";}i:15;a:2:{s:2:"id";s:4:"2405";s:4:"text";s:25:"JET CAR CORVETTE -
